pattern: Each gap larger than the reach forces a fixed number of evenly spaced inserts computed by ceiling division.
hints: Walk the rungs in order, tracking the height you currently stand on starting from the floor.
For each next rung, the gap from your current height decides how many extra rungs are needed.
Add ceil(gap/dist) minus one inserts per gap, summing over the floor-to-first and rung-to-rung gaps.

edge_inputs.description: anchor example gap from the floor
single far rung needs many inserts
exact multiple of dist needs no insert

stress.description: strictly increasing random rungs with a moderate reach
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    rungs = []
    cur = 0
    for _ in range(n):
        cur += rng.randint(1, 20)
        rungs.append(cur)
    dist = rng.randint(1, 15)
    return [rungs, dist]
